title: Sour Crunchy Kenyan Leek Soup
description: A monsoon-friendly leek soup with a tangy kick and crunchy texture, suitable for those following the fodmap diet.

ingredients.name: 1 cup leeks
ingredients.notes: use only the white and light green parts, finely chopped

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup canned mandarin oranges, peeled and sliced

instructions: Heat oil in a pot over medium heat. Add leeks, salt, black pepper, and optionally cayenne pepper. Cook until soft.
Add tomato paste and cook for about 1 minute to color the soup slightly.
Pour in coconut milk and stir well. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Let it simmer gently for about 30 minutes or until the leeks are very tender and the soup has thickened slightly.
